cause_description: Late arrival of aircraft crew passengers or baggage from previous rotation — causes knock-on delay to subsequent flights
lean_waste_description: Upstream failure propagates through value stream — scheduling buffer and rotation planning are countermeasures

cause_description: Airline-caused delays including ground handling turnaround issues technical faults catering boarding management

cause_description: ATC en-route and terminal delays — slot allocation ATFM restrictions and airspace congestion particularly at Sydney and Melbourne

applicability_note: ATC proportion overlaid with ACCC Sep2024 finding: 3% of delays attributed to Airservices Australia

cause_description: Meteorological conditions causing delays — storms fog wind and visibility below minimums

applicability_note: European proxy — Australian weather patterns differ particularly summer storm season in Queensland and NT
